creator: utisoft@gmail.com
text:
Sorry, forgot to mention that files/patch-gorilla.in was deleted.

So the directory tree afterwards should be:


[chris@amnesiac]/usr/ports% find security/gorilla/
security/gorilla/
security/gorilla/files
security/gorilla/files/gorilla.in
security/gorilla/Makefile
security/gorilla/distinfo
security/gorilla/pkg-descr
security/gorilla/pkg-plist
[chris@amnesiac]/usr/ports%


Sorry about that!
